product.name: MODE Coastal Collection 1 1/8" Diameter Curtain Rod Set with Coastal Shell Curtain Rod Finials and Steel Wall Mounted Adjustable Curtain Rod, Fits 36” to 72” Windows, Weathered White
features: Coastal Design - MODE Coastal Collection curtain rod set includes Coastal Shell finials for a simple, stylish look. A dedicated team of designers used the latest design trends to create this coastal finishing touch.

Easy to Install - This adjustable curtain rod has everything you need to hang curtains or draperies securely, making it a simple DIY project. The projection from the wall to the center of the rod can be adjusted from 4 to 5 1/2". See photos for detailed mounting instructions.

Durable and Reliable - This curtain rod set will hold curtains weighing up to 22 pounds and will not bend or bow over time. MODE heavy duty curtain rods allow you to safely hang heavy curtains or draperies while complementing your home decor style.

Quality Craftsmanship - With more than 25 years of experience, MODE is a brand you can trust to bring beauty, functionality and comfort to your home. All MODE curtain rods are covered by a 1-year manufacturer's warranty.

What’s Included - The adjustable curtain rod is 1 1/8” in diameter. Also includes 2 Coastal Shell finials, adjustable mounting brackets, screws, and drywall anchors. The 36” to 72” rod set has 2 adjustable mounting brackets, the 72” to 144” rod set has 3 brackets, and the 144” to 240” rod set has 4 brackets. The package contains detailed instructions and a list of parts. MODE Premium and Acrylic Curtain Clip Rings are also available in coordinating finishes.
